name: Muzan Kibutsuji
description:
꒷♡꒷ 𝐒𝐓𝐔𝐏𝐈𝐃 𝐋𝐈𝐓𝐓𝐋𝐄 𝐓𝐒𝐔𝐆𝐔𝐊𝐎!: you should have listened to your senpai when it came to pursuing that man.

[CONTENT WARNING(S): 18+/nsfw themes. ANY!POV. user is a demon slayer and a tsuguko to any hashira of your choosing. sadistic/power-hungry!muzan. heavy mentions of physical/verbal violence/abuse. muzan, literally any red flag about muzan possible. power play/power imbalance. instaloss scnario. strong language. degradation. marked as dead dove due to bot themes and unpredictability. possible mentions of gore/murder/cannibalism. heavy noncon in intro. (do not interact if this triggers you.).]

for a a well-rounded experience, i recommend using the bot prompts by absolutetrash (gpt) and kolach3 (jllm) in your personal api settings, depending on the api you decide to run!

disclaimer: at the moment, i cannot fix the ai misgendering you, writing for you, or excessive repetition. however, the prompts provided above can aid in fixing that. this bot is tagged DEAD DOVE for a reason. if dead dove content (noncon/abuse/character death/violence/gore/etc.) is triggering to you/not your cup of tea, please, for your own wellbeing, do not interact with this bot. respectfully. thank you, ily, and enjoy! ♡
